name: Kim Jong-un
role: Supreme Leader, Chairman of WPK, Chairman of State Affairs Commission
quote: The nuclear forces are the fundamental guarantee for the security and future of our state. We will never give up our nuclear weapons.

name: Kim Yo-jong
role: First Deputy Director, WPK Central Committee; Kim Jong-un's sister and de facto #2
quote: South Korea should bear in mind that if it ignites a war, North Korea will use all means including nuclear weapons to retaliate.

name: Choe Son-hui
role: Foreign Minister of DPRK (2023–present); former Deputy Foreign Minister and top nuclear negotiator
quote: The DPRK will take corresponding measures for every hostile act of the United States and its allies.

name: Choe Ryong-hae
role: President of the Presidium, Supreme People's Assembly (nominal head of state)
quote: Our respected Supreme Leader is the sun of our revolution, leading the Korean people to the final victory.

name: Pak Jong-chon
role: Secretary of WPK (Military Affairs), 1st Vice-President of National Defence Commission
quote: We stand ready to defeat any enemy through our nuclear shield and conventional military power.

name: No Kwang Chol
role: Minister of the People's Armed Forces (Defense Minister); met Russian DefMin Belousov in Pyongyang Apr 2026 to sign 2027–2031 military cooperation framework
quote: The DPRK's armed forces stand shoulder to shoulder with our Russian comrades. Our military brotherhood is forged in shared sacrifice.

name: Kim Il-sung
role: Founding Supreme Leader of DPRK (1948–1994); architect of Juche ideology and Kim dynasty
quote: The imperialists and their lackeys will never succeed in smothering the Korean people's struggle for independence and socialism.

name: Kim Jong-il
role: Supreme Leader of DPRK (1994–2011); General Secretary of WPK; presided over nuclear program inception
quote: Our strong military might is the cornerstone of peace and stability on the Korean peninsula.

name: Jang Song-thaek
role: Former Director of Administrative Dept, WPK; Kim Jong-un's uncle and regent; executed December 2013
quote: I carried out anti-party, counter-revolutionary factional acts with ambition to seize supreme power of the party and state. — (from DPRK trial indictment, 2013)

name: Yoon Suk-yeol
role: President of South Korea (2022–2025); impeached December 2024 following short-lived martial law declaration
quote: We will respond firmly to North Korean nuclear provocations and rebuild the ROK-US-Japan security architecture.

name: Moon Jae-in
role: President of South Korea (2017–2022); Sunshine Policy architect; held three summits with Kim Jong-un in 2018
quote: A new era of peace on the Korean Peninsula has begun today. We will no longer have war.

name: Lee Jae-myung
role: President of South Korea (2025–present); former leader of Democratic Party of Korea; favors engagement over pressure
quote: Dialogue is the only sustainable path to denuclearization. Military pressure alone has never worked.

name: Donald J. Trump
role: 45th & 47th US President; held historic Singapore summit with Kim Jong-un (Jun 2018) and Hanoi summit (Feb 2019)
quote: We have developed a very special bond. North Korea has tremendous potential, and it will be a great country some day.

name: Joe Biden
role: 46th US President (2021–2025); imposed additional sanctions on DPRK; called North Korea 'most urgent proliferation challenge'
quote: North Korea remains the most urgent proliferation challenge facing the United States. We will not tolerate nuclear coercion.

name: Antony Blinken
role: US Secretary of State (2021–2025); led US diplomatic pressure campaign on DPRK sanctions enforcement
quote: We have offered diplomacy without preconditions and North Korea has refused to engage. The path to sanctions relief runs through denuclearization.

name: Xi Jinping
role: General Secretary of CPC / President of China; DPRK's largest trading partner and diplomatic shield at UNSC
quote: China and the DPRK are connected by mountains and rivers. China is committed to peace and stability on the Korean Peninsula.

name: Wang Yi
role: Director of CPC Central Foreign Affairs Commission / Former Foreign Minister; China's chief diplomat on Korea policy
quote: Additional sanctions are not the answer. All parties should return to the negotiating table and address each other's legitimate concerns.

name: Vladimir Putin
role: President of Russia; signed Comprehensive Strategic Partnership Treaty with DPRK (June 2024); received ~15,000 DPRK troops in Kursk; signed 2027–2031 Military Cooperation Plan
quote: Russia and North Korea will continue to deepen their comprehensive strategic partnership. The heroism of the DPRK fighters deserves the highest recognition.

name: António Guterres
role: UN Secretary-General; called DPRK nuclear/missile program a 'serious threat to international peace and security'
quote: The DPRK's nuclear and ballistic missile activities continue to violate Security Council resolutions and pose a serious threat to international peace.

name: Rafael Mariano Grossi
role: IAEA Director-General; repeatedly warned DPRK has restarted plutonium production reactor at Yongbyon
quote: The IAEA has been unable to verify the DPRK's nuclear activities since our inspectors were expelled in 2009. The Yongbyon reactor restart is deeply troubling.

name: Tomás Ojea Quintana
role: UN Special Rapporteur on the situation of human rights in the DPRK (2016–2022); documented systematic abuses
quote: The systematic, widespread and grave violations of human rights in the DPRK may amount to crimes against humanity. Accountability must follow.
